text: # GROOVY Installazione GROOVY *bash <d sopt/ sudo wget https://archive.apache.org/dist/groovy/3.0.9/distribution/apache-groovy-binary-3.0.9.2ip & sudo unzip apache-groovy-binary-3.0.9.7ip & sudo rm apache-groovy-binary-3.0.9.2ip echo 'GROOVY_HOME=/0pt/groovy-3.0.9" | sudo tee -a /etc/environment & echo 'PATH=SPATH: SGROOVY_HOME/bin' | sudo tee -a /etc/environnent groovy —version
